description: The full CI/CD pipeline. Two jobs: lint-and-test validates code quality, docker-build verifies containers start correctly.
code:
name: CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  lint-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with: { python-version: "3.12" }

      - uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.cache/pip
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('backend/requirements.txt') }}

      - run: pip install -r backend/requirements.txt
      - run: pip install flake8 && flake8 backend/ --max-line-length=120

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "22"
          cache: npm
          cache-dependency-path: frontend/package-lock.json

      - run: npm ci
        working-directory: frontend
      - run: npm run lint
        working-directory: frontend
      - run: npx tsc --noEmit
        working-directory: frontend

      - run: FLASK_APP=app:create_app python -m flask seed-db
        working-directory: backend

      - run: npm run build
        working-directory: frontend
        env:
          NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL: http://localhost:5000/api

  docker-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: lint-and-test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: docker compose build
      - run: |
          docker compose up -d
          for i in $(seq 1 30); do
            if curl -sf http://localhost:5000/api/health > /dev/null; then
              echo "Health check passed"
              exit 0
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          echo "Health check failed"
          docker compose logs
          exit 1
      - if: always()
        run: docker compose down
